he64ac5c0g3e02g4451g9767g854943f6b3ab: The druids' enchantment is impassable. You should have killed them before they sealed their grove.
hbc215f3dg4f11g4d7ag9875gd93f0b5f1c5d: You are alive? Not for long.
h00bad12bg5683g4fc1ga33dgb035343f7f07: Your overeagerness to spill blood has led the inhabitants to cower behind this enchantment.
hc7739c9eg47c2g4799g9285g3b0283dfc8d9: You can't blame me for this - the druids' magic is stronger than I expected.
hc0985042g6039g41d0ga82fg82185688993e: And you are weaker than I hoped.
h77f03483g1de1g4ea0gb302g2831f05aa60b: I'm sorry - what can I do to make this right?
